ESLint: Using `` could result in slower LCP and higher bandwidth. Consider using `` from `next/image` or a custom image loader to automatically optimize images. ESLint: React Hook useCallback has missing dependencies: 'handleClose' and 'onSuccess'. Either include them or remove the dependency array. If 'onSuccess' changes too often, find the parent component that defines it and wrap that definition in useCallback. (react-hooks/exhaustive-deps)
